resources.string: Export your transactions to a JSON file, or restore from a previous backup. Files are saved via your device\'s file picker, which includes Google Drive if installed.
Importing a backup will delete all current transactions and recurring transactions, replacing them with the data from the backup file.\n\nThis action cannot be undone.
Track expenses, manage budgets,\nand take control of your finances
Permission denied. Please try again and grant file access.
Not enough storage space. Free up space and try again.
Invalid backup file. The file may be corrupted or in an unsupported format.
Permission denied. Please try again and grant file access.
Could not read the selected file. Please try a different file.
The backup file is missing required data (transactions or recurring transactions).
Google Sign-In is not configured yet. Please set up a Web Client ID in the Google Cloud Console, then update the default_web_client_id string resource.
No Google accounts found on this device. Please add a Google account in device Settings, or continue as Guest.
Google Play Services is required for Google Sign-In. Please install or update Google Play Services.
Network error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
Sign-in failed: %1$s. You can continue as Guest.
An unexpected error occurred. You can continue as Guest.
Failed to process Google credentials. Please try again.
Unexpected credential type received. Please try again.
Unrecognized sign-in method. Please try again.
